transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today,
School cafeteria food
I wanted to get 6 plates, but I couldn't fit everything here
So I have 4 for now
I want to eat this Jamaican chicken leg
I got the combinations I enjoyed at school
Bon appetit
This is such a pleasant worry
I can't choose what to eat first
What should I eat?
Let's do Ramyun first
This is really good
I got Ramyun instead of the udon
Right, if you don't eat it quickly, your friends will steal your food
It's not crispy anymore

That's tasty
Curry and kimchi
Kimchi is a must when it comes to curry
The cream soup
It's hardened
Or maybe I made it too thick
Is this forreal? I must have made it too thick
It's salty But still good
I'll pour some more hot water later
This is the shrimp stick
I got this instead of the shrimp tempura
This is a perfect dip
It's a sauce
It tastes better than the shrimp tempura
Let's mix up the spaghetti
Isn't spaghetti the most common and popular dish at the cafeteria?

They would serve this every Wednesdays and the students loved it
It's good
[Chat: Eat the spinach] Fine
I was going to eat it later with this dish
Not bad
This is the hamburg steak
Pop it
That's so good
Sausage and rice cake I ordered it just because I wanted to eat it
I don't think I've seen this at the cafeteria
Stir-fried sausage
Soy sauce braised beef
That's true love
It's from Bibigo (brand)
Spicy stir-fried pork with rice
So good

This is the soybean stew
Pan-fried meat patty
Right, the curry comes out with pickled radish I forgot about it
The pork cutlet is so thick Look at it
Really?
I've never seen it this thick
Yummy
Very chewy
I'll finish the noodles now
[Chat: You just microwaved everything] Correct
Can't deny that
Korean style egg rolls
Does it have cheese? Nope
This comes with ketchup
But I hate ketchup
[Chat: Did you eat a lot at school?]

I didn't eat that much in front of people
Just when I was alone
Stir-fried kimchi from Bibigo
Look how thick this is too
So delicious
I would run to the cafeteria just like Tzusain Bolt
I was 1st in line many times
Pizza!
Spicy stir-fried pork
I used to love this dish too
They give it to you over here
But I would always ask to put it over rice
It's better like that
Did they give you guys seconds at your school?
There was never enough for seconds at our school
I also put in a slip in the Suggestions Box

The guys would get like this much food
I would always say, "Please give me a lot!"
And they would give me this much
My friends said they've never seen me that upset
I was pissed
Right? It's like that for other schools as well?
Well, the guys eat more than girls, and I agree
Girls always leave leftovers
But not me! So unfair
I wanted some bread as an appetizer But this looks like some tortilla
Was I supposed to put the spaghetti in here?
Like this
I think eating them separately was better
Let's just use this as a bowl
Yum!
This is chewy

It's like cheese
That's interesting
I microwaved it with more water
This is it!
That's really big
Just look at the thickness
Tasty
There's no way I could've made all this
Me?
This one is finished
[Chat: How did you overcome hunger while you were at school?]
Convenience store
There was a salad?
Let's switch up the plates
I know Galaxy Express 999 (TV show animation)
I know them

I read Barbapapa
Cooking Master Boy too
Yum
These egg rolls are really good
I can't eat anymore Sorry
But I will eat this Yoplait (Yogurt)
My highschool never gave us ice cream
Thanks everyone~
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
